text.message: That 5-6-9 to brick port was so tempting lol
Every time I do that though there’s always one person that just places settlement there with no brick 😂
It’s either a race for wheat port or I take 3-6 sheep/ore
Red and blue placements really hurt both of us lol
A couple courtesy NBs back and forth for this placement because I really want 3-4-11 lol
I didn't agree to that homie
No I know, just throwing it out there
Since I would’ve most likely won the race with you not having wood
Eh then you’re game is over
No ore or wood and just a 3-1
blue I'll 2:1 for wood on my turn
It’s all good. 10 has to roll eventually right lol
I’d do it but it would put me over 7
eh just got ahead of myself
Sorry that was the real reason i was holding
Sorry blue, you’re entirely too far ahead
Block reds 10 so mine will roll 😂😂😂😂
Heyooo I just needed a city on it lmao
go fish but it shouldn't be me haha
Hey blue I’ll give you an over the pants handy for my ore back
Steal him while he’s a bot
Anytime I 2-1 and put myself over, it’s guaranteed
it's black rest of game lol
Just cause I’m black? That’s messed up
i live in america, it's a systemic issue
So who do I block then?
and i am the orange man
you're lucky you're not a lighter shade
I appreciate you recognizing blue as a threat as well 🤙🏼
So while weee doing all of this red will just run away with it 😂
you're much more dangerous endgame wise though
I want him to feel the love too
I mean blue could be on 9 with road
Not making him play his devs is dNgerous
you guys don't share a tile unfortunately
I really don’t think I’m the rob right now
ows with the on board lead
Blue is one road away from 9
And now you might have army
i blocked his wood and stole form him
It’s alright a 5 hasn’t rolled since nam
i'm in last and my wc is 2 turns away
